segments.speaker: CATHY
segments.en: Good idea.

segments.speaker: GRAHAM
segments.en: OK, so next we need to think about what materials we want to illustrate each issue.
segments.zh: 好，那接下来我们得想想用什么材料来展示每个议题。这还挺难的。

segments.speaker: GRAHAM
segments.en: That's going to be quite hard.

segments.speaker: LECTURER
segments.en: I'm going to report on a case study of a programme which has been set up to help rural populations in Mozambique, a largely agricultural country in South-East Africa.
segments.zh: 我要报告一个案例研究，这个项目旨在帮助莫桑比克的农村人口。莫桑比克是非洲东南部一个以农业为主的国家。该项目与林波波河附近奇夸拉库拉地区的三个社区合作。这是一个干旱少雨的地区，降雨量难以预测。因此，当地居民无法通过农业自给自足，转而依靠森林谋生，主要是通过出售木炭。然而，从长远来看，这不是一种可持续的生活方式，因为他们正在迅速消耗这种资源。

segments.speaker: LECTURER
segments.en: The programme worked with three communities in Chicualacula district, near the Limpopo River.

segments.speaker: LECTURER
segments.en: This is a dry and arid region, with unpredictable rainfall.

segments.speaker: LECTURER
segments.en: Because of this, people in the area were unable to support themselves through agriculture and instead they used the forest as a means of providing themselves with an income, mainly by selling charcoal.

segments.speaker: LECTURER
segments.en: However, this was not a sustainable way of living in the long term, as they were rapidly using up this resource.

segments.speaker: LECTURER
segments.en: To support agriculture in this dry region, the programme focused primarily on making use of existing water resources from the Limpopo River by setting up systems of irrigation, which would provide a dependable water supply for crops and animals.
segments.zh: 为了支持这个干旱地区的农业，该项目主要侧重于利用林波波河的现有水资源，建立灌溉系统，为农作物和牲畜提供可靠的水源。该项目与区政府密切合作，以找到最佳实施方式。该地区已经有一个农民协会，他们决定再成立两个。这些协会规划并开展了包括水资源管理、牲畜养殖和农业在内的活动，值得注意的是，劳动力中女性占大多数。

segments.speaker: LECTURER
segments.en: The programme worked closely with the district government in order to find the best way of implementing this.

segments.speaker: LECTURER
segments.en: The region already had one farmers' association, and it was decided to set up two more of these.

segments.speaker: LECTURER
segments.en: These associations planned and carried out activities including water management, livestock breeding and agriculture, and it was notable that in general, women formed the majority of the workforce.

segments.speaker: LECTURER
segments.en: It was decided that in order to keep the crops safe from animals, both wild and domestic, special areas should be fenced off where the crops could be grown.
segments.zh: 为了确保农作物免受野生动物和家养动物的侵害，决定将特定区域围起来，用于种植作物。社区负责建造这些围栏，但项目提供了所需的铁丝。

segments.speaker: LECTURER
segments.en: The community was responsible for creating these fences, but the programme provided the necessary wire for making them.

segments.speaker: LECTURER
segments.en: Once the area had been fenced off, it could be cultivated.
segments.zh: 一旦区域被围起来，就可以进行耕种。土地被翻耕，以便种植适合气候的蔬菜和谷物，项目提供了所需的种子。项目还提供了水泵，以便通过管道将水从河流引到田地。然而，所有劳动力都由当地人提供，他们还提供并竖立了支撑田地围栏的柱子。

segments.speaker: LECTURER
segments.en: The land was dug, so that vegetables and cereals appropriate to the climate could be grown, and the programme provided the necessary seeds for this.

segments.speaker: LECTURER
segments.en: The programme also provided pumps so that water could be brought from the river in pipes to the fields.

segments.speaker: LECTURER
segments.en: However, the labour was all provided by local people, and they also provided and put up the posts that supported the fences around the fields.

segments.speaker: LECTURER
segments.en: Once the programme had been set up, its development was monitored carefully.
segments.zh: 项目启动后，其发展情况受到密切监控。农民们种植的农产品不仅满足自身需求，还能出售。然而，将农产品运到市场有时是个问题，因为农民没有交通工具，导致大量农产品，尤其是蔬菜，被损坏。这个问题与农民协会进行了讨论，决定为了防止食物变质，农民需要学习保鲜技术。

segments.speaker: LECTURER
segments.en: The farmers were able to grow enough produce not just for their own needs, but also to sell.

segments.speaker: LECTURER
segments.en: However, getting the produce to places where it could be marketed was sometimes a problem, as the farmers did not have access to transport, and this resulted in large amounts of produce, especially vegetables, being spoiled.

segments.speaker: LECTURER
segments.en: This problem was discussed with the farmers' associations and it was decided that in order to prevent food from being spoiled, the farmers needed to learn techniques for its preservation.

segments.speaker: LECTURER
segments.en: There was also an additional initiative that had not been originally planned, but which became a central feature of the programme.
segments.zh: 还有一个最初未计划但后来成为项目核心的额外举措。农民开始在围起来的区域挖坑，安装水箱，装满水，用于养鱼——这是一个重要的蛋白质来源。过了一段时间，当地人又提出了另一个建议，这并非项目最初提案的一部分，但后来也被采纳了。他们决定尝试养蜂，这样既能自用蜂蜜，也能出售。

segments.speaker: LECTURER
segments.en: This was when farmers started to dig holes for tanks in the fenced-off areas and to fill these with water and use them for breeding fish – an important source of protein.

segments.speaker: LECTURER
segments.en: After a time, another suggestion was made by local people which hadn't been part of the programme's original proposal, but which was also adopted later on.

segments.speaker: LECTURER
segments.en: They decided to try setting up colonies of bees, which would provide honey both for their own consumption and to sell.

segments.speaker: LECTURER
segments.en: So what lessons can be learned from this programme?
segments.zh: 那么从这个项目中能学到什么经验呢？首先，它告诉我们，在干旱地区，如果能获得可靠的水源，农业发展的潜力就很大。在奇夸拉库拉，农业生产有了显著提高，这改善了粮食安全，并通过提供食物和收入使当地居民受益。然而，为项目的每个阶段设定现实的时间表很重要，尤其是在设计阶段，因为这一阶段的错误可能很难在后期纠正。

segments.speaker: LECTURER
segments.en: First of all, it tells us that in dry, arid regions, if there is access to a reliable source of water, there is great potential for the development of agriculture.

segments.speaker: LECTURER
segments.en: In Chicualacula, there was a marked improvement in agricultural production, which improved food security and benefited local people by providing them with both food and income.

segments.speaker: LECTURER
segments.en: However, it's important to set realistic timelines for each phase of the programme, especially for its design, as mistakes made at this stage may be hard to correct later on.

segments.speaker: LECTURER
segments.en: The programme demonstrates that sustainable development is possible in areas where ...
segments.zh: 该项目表明，在那些……地区实现可持续发展是可能的。

items.prompt: was seen as the main priority to ensure the supply of water.

pairs.note: main priority 与 focused primarily on 同义，表示首要关注
ensure the supply 与 provide a dependable supply 同义，都表示确保供水

paraphrase.explain: 题干问的是确保供水的首要任务，原文说项目主要关注利用现有水资源建立灌溉系统以提供可靠供水，因此 irrigation 是答案。

items.prompt: Most of the work organised by farmers' associations was done by

pairs.p: associations planned and carried out activities
pairs.note: 原文用'planned and carried out activities'替换了题干中的'work organised'，意思相同。

pairs.p: formed the majority of the workforce
pairs.note: 原文用'formed the majority of the workforce'替换了'was done by'，表示工作由谁完成。
原文直接出现'women'，与题干关键词完全一致。

paraphrase.explain: 定位句提到'These associations planned and carried out activities... and it was notable that in general, women formed the majority of the workforce.'，其中'associations planned and carried out activities'对应题干'work organised by farmers' associations'，'women formed the majority of the workforce'对应'was done by women'，因此答案就是women。

pairs.note: 题干fences与原文fences完全一致，直接定位。
题干'for the fences'对应原文'wire for making them'，说明栅栏所需的材料是铁丝。

paraphrase.explain: 通过题干关键词fences定位到原文fences，再根据上下文找到提供栅栏所需的材料是wire。

pairs.p: vegetables and cereals appropriate to the climate
pairs.note: 题干说'合适的作物'，原文具体举例'蔬菜和谷物适合气候'，是具体化同义替换。
题干'for'对应原文'for this'，指代前文种植作物，直接对应。

paraphrase.explain: 定位句提到种植蔬菜和谷物需要种子，题干问'for suitable crops'，原文'for this'指代种植，因此答案'seed(s)'。

items.prompt: for the fences on their land.

pairs.note: 题干和原文中都是'fences'，直接对应。
'on their land' 被替换为 'around the fields'，意思相近，都是指土地周围。
题干说'for the fences'（用于围栏），原文说'supported the fences'（支撑围栏），功能相同。

paraphrase.explain: 题干问'for the fences on their land'，原文提到'provided and put up the posts that supported the fences around the fields'，其中'posts'是答案，'fences'和'around the fields'对应题干中的'fences'和'on their land'。

items.prompt: The marketing of produce was sometimes difficult due to lack of

pairs.q: marketing of produce was sometimes difficult
pairs.p: getting the produce to places where it could be marketed was sometimes a problem
pairs.note: 题干说'营销农产品有时困难'，原文说'把农产品运到可以销售的地方有时是个问题'，两者意思相同，但表述不同。

pairs.p: did not have access to transport
pairs.note: 题干'缺乏交通'对应原文'没有交通途径'，'lack of'和'did not have access to'是同义替换。

paraphrase.explain: 定位句提到'getting the produce to places where it could be marketed was sometimes a problem'，与题干'marketing of produce was sometimes difficult'对应，后面直接给出原因'did not have access to transport'，即题干所需答案'transport'。

items.prompt: Training was therefore provided in methods of food

pairs.q: Training was therefore provided in methods of food
pairs.note: 题干说'提供培训在食物...方法'，原文说'学习保存技术'，'training'对应'learn'，'methods'对应'techniques'，'food preservation'对应'its preservation'。

paraphrase.explain: 定位句最后一句提到'learn techniques for its preservation'，其中'its'指代'food'，与题干'food'对应，'preservation'即为答案。

items.prompt: Farmers made special places where could be kept.

pairs.p: holes for tanks in the fenced-off areas
pairs.note: 题干中的'special places'在原文中被具体描述为'holes for tanks in the fenced-off areas'，即围栏区域内的坑洞。
题干中的'could be kept'对应原文中的'breeding fish'，表示养殖鱼类。

paraphrase.explain: 通过定位词'farmers'和'fish'，在原文中找到描述农民挖坑养鱼的部分，从而确定答案。

pairs.p: another suggestion was made by local people
pairs.note: 题干中的'suggested'被替换为'suggestion was made'，意思相同但词性变化。
'keeping bees'与'setting up colonies of bees'同义，指养蜂。

paraphrase.explain: 定位句提到'another suggestion was made by local people'，对应题干中的'Local people later suggested'，随后出现'setting up colonies of bees'，即答案'bees'。

items.prompt: Enough time must be allowed, particularly for the phase of the programme.

pairs.note: 题干说'留出足够时间'，原文说'设定现实的时间线'，意思相同。

pairs.q: particularly for the phase of the programme
pairs.note: 题干'特别是项目的阶段'对应原文'尤其是其设计阶段'，'phase'与'design'同义替换。

paraphrase.explain: 定位句提到'set realistic timelines for each phase of the programme, especially for its design'，与题干'Enough time must be allowed, particularly for the phase of the programme'对应，其中'design'就是答案。
